blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
